name: pdb-database
description: RCSB Protein Data Bank — search for and download experimentally-determined 3D biomolecular structures (proteins, nucleic acids, bound ligands). Supports structure search, sequence similarity, chemical search, and metadata fetch via the RCSB Data API. Pairs naturally with the alphafold-database sub-plugin (predicted vs experimental structures). Backed by the public RCSB APIs — no auth. Vendored from the google-deepmind/science-skills bundle.
author: zorai

search.description: Search the PDB using the RCSB Search API v2. Supports full-text, sequence similarity, structure similarity, chemical similarity, and motif search.

python.command: uv run scripts/search_pdb.py --query "${PDB_QUERY:?set PDB_QUERY (JSON search query)}" --return_type "${PDB_RETURN_TYPE:-entry}" ${PDB_SORT_BY:+--sort_by $PDB_SORT_BY} ${PDB_SORT_DIRECTION:+--sort_direction $PDB_SORT_DIRECTION} ${PDB_PAGE_START:+--page_start $PDB_PAGE_START} ${PDB_ROWS:+--rows $PDB_ROWS} ${PDB_COUNT_ONLY:+--count-only} --output "${PDB_OUTPUT:?set PDB_OUTPUT}"

fetch-metadata.description: Fetch PDB entry metadata via the RCSB Data API GraphQL endpoint. Use for rich per-entry details (resolution, R-factor, chains, ligands, citations).

python.command: uv run scripts/fetch_pdb_metadata.py --query "${PDB_QUERY:?set PDB_QUERY (GraphQL query, e.g. entry id list)}" --output "${PDB_OUTPUT:?set PDB_OUTPUT}"

download-coordinates.description: Download coordinate files (mmCIF / PDB) for one or more PDB entries. Output is a directory of <ID>.cif / <ID>.pdb files.

python.command: uv run scripts/download_coordinate_files.py --ids "${PDB_IDS:?set PDB_IDS (comma-separated PDB IDs, e.g. 1A2B,4HHB)}" --format "${PDB_FORMAT:-cif}" --output_dir "${PDB_OUTPUT_DIR:?set PDB_OUTPUT_DIR}"

fetch-schema.description: Fetch the RCSB Data API GraphQL schema (introspection). Use to discover available fields and types when building new search or metadata queries.
